name: heliosoph-datumv-electron
description: Electron shell for Heliosoph DatumV. Owns the main BrowserWindow, dialog windows, and the .NET subprocess lifecycle.

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && concurrently --kill-others --names "vite,electron" -c "cyan,green" "npm --prefix ../ClientApp run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:linux && npm run build && electron-builder --linux
